channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Junior Social Media Assistant — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Help grow our social channels. Pitch fresh formats and ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Junior Editorial Coordinator — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Pitch, draft and edit original explainers. Bring fresh editorial angles. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Junior Data Analyst — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Turn Zimbabwe public data into clear visual stories. Bring new data ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Business Development Associate — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)

item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Nurses Carry Our Lives in Their Hands and Must Be Protected, Respected and Empowered @263Chat
item.description: While nurses are often praised as heroes, many continue to work under immense pressure, poor conditions and limited support. The post Nurses Carry Our Lives in Their Hands and Must Be Protected, Respected and Empowered appeared first on 263Chat. #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: ZDF clarifies Falcon Golf Course status...area gazetted as defence cantonment
item.description: Herald Reporter THE Zimbabwe Defence Forces (ZDF) has clarified that Falcon Golf Course in Hatfield, Harare, has been officially gazetted as a military cantonment area under Statutory Instrument 28 of... via Ebusiness Weekly #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Ebusiness Weekly

item.title: ZSE Defies Liquidity Slowdown as Blue-Chip Counters Lift All-Share Index @ZSE_ZW
item.description: HARARE – The Zimbabwe Stock Exchange delivered a mixed but resilient performance in April 2026, with gains in the benchmark All-Share Index offsetting a steep decline in market turnover and trading volumes as investor activity softened across the bourse. According to The Herald, via The Zimbabwe Mail #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Shumba Maasai Brings Zimbabwean Cultural Interventions to Venice Biennale with Procession Across Historic Campos
item.description: Zimbabwean multidisciplinary artist Shumba Maasai led a day of cultural interventions across Venice’s historic campos on 9 May, culminating at the Zimbabwe Pavilion at the 61st Venice Biennale — turning public squares into temporary Shona dare spaces of dialogue, storytelling and ceremony. via Tendai Kuwanda #Zimbabwe #Culture #ZimbabweCulture #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Tendai Kuwanda

item.title: GMB Clears Wheat Payment Arrears
item.description: GMB settles outstanding wheat arrears, offering financial relief to growers while enhancing food security and agricultural sector stability in Zimbabwe. The post GMB Clears Wheat Payment Arrears appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: City Of Harare Issues Hantavirus Warning And Prevention Tips
item.description: Harare Says No Confirmed Hantavirus Cases In Zimbabwe After Global Health Alert The City of Harare has moved to calm public fears following international reports about Hantavirus infections linked to cruise ship travel. Authorities said Zimbabwe has not recorded any confirmed cas via Iharare News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: The price of Chivayo’s Fortuner: Why Zimpapers drew a line in the sand @nehandaradio @wicknellchivayo
item.description: Zimbabwe Newspapers Group has sparked debate after reportedly ordering staff at Capitalk FM to return most of the cash gifts received from businessman Wicknell Chivayo. The post The price of Chivayo’s Fortuner: Why Zimpapers drew a line in the sand appeared first on Nehanda Radio #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: CZI tells private sector to leverage Zim’s trade pacts @zimsituation
item.description: Source: CZI tells private sector to leverage Zim’s trade pacts – herald Sikhulekelani Moyo Zimpapers Business Hub THE Confederation of Zimbabwe Industries has urged the private sector to utilise trade agreements that Zimbabwe has signed to strengthen export competitiveness and re via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: GMB pays wheat farmers US$4m to clear 2025 debt @zimsituation
item.description: Source: GMB pays wheat farmers US$4m to clear 2025 debt – herald Edgar Vhera Specialist Writer – Agribusiness The Grain Marketing Board has paid farmers more than US$4 million towards clearing US dollar debts for the 2025 wheat deliveries and pledged to make prompt payments going via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Mutapa Gold Resources seeks US$250m to extend mine life @zimsituation
item.description: Source: Mutapa Gold Resources seeks US$250m to extend mine life – herald Nelson Gahadza Senior Business Reporter Zimbabwe’s sovereign wealth vehicle, Mutapa Investment Fund, requires over US$250 million to expand the life of its gold mining operations under the Mutapa Gold Resour via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Zimpapers orders staff to return Chivayo cash gifts, gives presenter vehicle ultimatum @nehandaradio @wicknellchivayo
item.description: Zimbabwe Newspapers Group has instructed Capitalk FM staff to return most of the cash gifts distributed by businessman Wicknell Chivayo, while presenter Phathisani Sibanda has reportedly been told to reject a luxury vehicle offer or leave the company. The post Zimpapers orders st via Nehanda Radio #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio
